sys_update_xml.name: sys_ux_client_script_048df0a93b154bd075e10964c3e45aae
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_ux_client_script"><sys_ux_client_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><controller_preset/><includes/><macroponent display_value="Dashboards">c08df0a93b154bd075e10964c3e45aa6</macroponent><name>Navigate to dashboard scheduled export</name><preset/><required_translations>[]</required_translations><script><![CDATA[/**
* @param {params} params
* @param {api} params.api
* @param {any} params.event
* @param {any} params.imports
* @param {ApiHelpers} params.helpers
*/
function handler({api, event, helpers, imports}) {
    api.emit('NAV_ITEM_SELECTED', {
        route: 'scheduled-export',
        icon: 'calendar-days-clock-outline',
        title: 'Scheduled Export',
         fields: {
            sysId:'new' + Date.now(),
        },
        params: {
            dashboardId: event.payload.dashboardSysId,
        }
    });
}]]></script><script_api_version>2.0.0</script_api_version><sys_class_name>sys_ux_client_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>bandganesh</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-05 12:50:21</sys_created_on><sys_customer_update>false</sys_customer_update><sys_id>048df0a93b154bd075e10964c3e45aae</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Navigate to dashboard scheduled export</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_replace_on_upgrade>false</sys_replace_on_upgrade><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ux_client_script_048df0a93b154bd075e10964c3e45aae</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>bandganesh</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-05 12:50:21</sys_updated_on><target>macroponent</target><type>default</type></sys_ux_client_script></record_update>

sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_ux_client_script"><sys_ux_client_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><controller_preset/><includes>fdacb518b7320110aab961d9ce11a989</includes><macroponent display_value="Dashboards">c08df0a93b154bd075e10964c3e45aa6</macroponent><name>Dashboard Widget Clicked</name><preset/><required_translations>[]</required_translations><script><![CDATA[/**
* @param {params} params
* @param {api} params.api
* @param {any} params.event
* @param {any} params.imports
* @param {ApiHelpers} params.helpers
*/
function handler({api, event, helpers, imports}) {
	helpers.timing.setTimeout(function() {
		const polarisProperty = this.ux_globals.sysprops['glide.ui.polaris.experience'];
        const polarisUserPref = this.ux_globals.userPrefs['glide.ui.polaris.use'];
        const isPolarisDisabled = !(
           polarisProperty.toString().toLowerCase() === 'true' &&
           polarisUserPref === 'true'
        );

		const {getPayload} = imports['sn_app_analytics_w.ParWidgetsDrilldowns']();	
    	const payload = getPayload(event, isPolarisDisabled, this);	
		api.emit('NAV_ITEM_SELECTED', payload);
	});
}]]></script><script_api_version>2.0.0</script_api_version><sys_class_name>sys_ux_client_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>bandganesh</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-05 12:50:21</sys_created_on><sys_customer_update>false</sys_customer_update><sys_id>808df0a93b154bd075e10964c3e45ab4</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Dashboard Widget Clicked</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_replace_on_upgrade>false</sys_replace_on_upgrade><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ux_client_script_808df0a93b154bd075e10964c3e45ab4</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>bandganesh</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-05 12:50:21</sys_updated_on><target>macroponent</target><type>default</type></sys_ux_client_script></record_update>

sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_ux_client_script"><sys_ux_client_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><controller_preset/><includes/><macroponent display_value="Dashboards">c08df0a93b154bd075e10964c3e45aa6</macroponent><name>Redirect to dashboard list</name><preset/><required_translations>[]</required_translations><script><![CDATA[/**
* @param {params} params
* @param {api} params.api
* @param {any} params.event
* @param {any} params.imports
* @param {ApiHelpers} params.helpers
*/
function handler({api}) {
    api.emit('SCREEN_STATUS_CHANGED', {status: 'closed'});
    api.emit('NAV_ITEM_SELECTED', {
        route: 'dashboard-library',
        title: 'Dashboard Library',
    });
}]]></script><script_api_version>2.0.0</script_api_version><sys_class_name>sys_ux_client_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>bandganesh</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-05 12:50:21</sys_created_on><sys_customer_update>false</sys_customer_update><sys_id>c08df0a93b154bd075e10964c3e45ad2</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Redirect to dashboard list</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_replace_on_upgrade>false</sys_replace_on_upgrade><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_ux_client_script_c08df0a93b154bd075e10964c3e45ad2</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>bandganesh</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-05 12:50:21</sys_updated_on><target>macroponent</target><type>default</type></sys_ux_client_script></record_update>
